businessPurpose: mobile strategy2 tab must call the formal Strategy2 API payload, not static fixture data
verifierRule: file contains strategy2 tab config and formal /api/strategy2-latest endpoint

businessPurpose: mobile boot payload must keep Strategy2 bound to the formal latest endpoint
verifierRule: file contains strategy2 endpoint in TAB_ENDPOINTS

businessPurpose: desktop/home aggregation must require and call the formal Strategy2 API handler
verifierRule: file requires strategy2-latest and exposes Strategy2 mobile/home payload
